title: Eltuu Muthaa
overview: Eltuu Muthaa (2025) is a Kannada thriller-drama set in the rain-soaked Kodagu (Coorg) hills, following two funeral drummers whose intertwined destinies echo local tradition and a cryptic peacock-and-cobra fable
